details.page_load: OK — qianwen.com loaded, chat interface with Qwen3.5-千问 model selector, input placeholder '向千问提问'
details.ai_response: 消息生成失败，请重试 (Message generation failed, please retry) — with retry icon
details.error_type: SAME_AS_380 — generic Qianwen error instead of Etap warning content
details.cors_fix_effect: No improvement. CORS headers (Origin: https://tongyi.aliyun.com, Credentials: true) + qianwen_sse template did NOT resolve the '消息生成失败' error.
details.diagnosis: The qianwen_sse response is blocked at network level (API call intercepted), but Qianwen frontend cannot parse the injected SSE response. Frontend shows generic error instead of warning content. Possible causes: (1) SSE format mismatch with Qianwen's expected openai-compat format, (2) response headers still incompatible, (3) Qianwen uses custom event parsing that rejects non-standard SSE data.

recommendation: Need to capture Qianwen's actual SSE response format (Content-Type, event field names, data structure) via HAR to create a byte-accurate compatible template. The current qianwen_sse template format does not match what Qianwen's frontend JavaScript expects.
